memoryArtifacts.headline: BIO
memoryArtifacts.description:
BIO:  from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/BRITTANY.htm#GuillaumeFougeresdied1187A as of 1/18/2016
RAOUL [II] de Fougères (-Sauvigny 16 May 1194).  He succeeded his father in 1154 as Seigneur de Fougè …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Raoul II de Fougeres於1128年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉福雷斯時，他的父親Henri de Fougères42歲，母親Olive de Penthièvre42歲。他於1150年與Jeanne De Dol結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1194年6月15日在法國布格尼艾福薩維尼享年66歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fougeres
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Alcide, Armand, Emile, Fleurette, Thierry.

French (Fougère): topographic name for someone who lived in a place densely grown with ferns, from Old French foug(i)ere ‘fern, bracken’ (from Late Latin filicaria); or a habitational name from (La) Fougère, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Fugere .

History: Jean Fougère from Poupry in Eure-et-Loir, France, married first Marie Bourg in Port-Royal in Acadia (now Annapolis Royal in NS, Canada) in 1713, and second Marie-Madeleine Belliveau in Port-Toulouse (St. Peters), NS, Canada, c. 1728.

variants.name: Fugere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Celine, Emile, Gilles, Lucien, Normand, Philippe, Pierre, Sylvian.
French (Fugère): variant of Fougère (see Fougere ) and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Raoul II de Fougeres was born in 1128, in Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, his father, Henri de Fougères, was 42 and his mother, Olive de Penthièvre, was 42. He married Jeanne De Dol in 1150. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 15 June 1194, in Savigny, Nièvre, Burgundy, France, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Raoul II de Fougeres est né en 1128, à Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Henri de Fougères, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Olive de Penthièvre, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne De Dol en 1150. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 15 juin 1194, à Savigny, Nièvre, Bourgogne, France, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Raoul II de Fougeres 1128 in Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henri de Fougères 42 und seine Mutter Olive de Penthièvre 42. Er hat 1150 Jeanne De Dol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Juni 1194 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Savigny, Nièvre, Burgund, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul II de Fougeres è nato il nel 1128 nel Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Henri de Fougères, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Olive de Penthièvre, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne De Dol nel 1150. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 15 giugno 1194, nel Savigny, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Raoul II de Fougeresが1128年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインフォウグeレスで生まれた時，父Henri de Fougèresは42歳，母Olive de Penthièvreは42歳であった。1150年にJeanne De Dolと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1194年6月15日にフランスボウルゴグンニevアサヴィグニーで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Raoul II de Fougeres(이)가 1128년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 포우그e레스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henri de Fougères(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Olive de Penthièvre(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1150년 Jeanne De Dol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1194년 6월 15일 프랑스 부르고그니 니e브르 서아비그니에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul II de Fougeres nasceu em 1128, em Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Henri de Fougères, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Olive de Penthièvre, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne De Dol em 1150. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de junho de 1194, em Savigny, Nièvre, Bourgogne, França, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Raoul II de Fougeres родился в 1128 г. в местности фоугeресь, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Henri de Fougères было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Olive de Penthièvre, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne De Dol в 1150 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 15 июня 1194 г. в местности савигни, ниeвр, бургогн, Франция в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Raoul II de Fougeres nació en 1128, en Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Henri de Fougères, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Olive de Penthièvre, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Jeanne De Dol en 1150. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 15 de junio de 1194, en Savigny, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia, a la edad de 66 años.
